description: System audio capture + multi-provider ASR + local-first AI review workspace. Floating live captions, 12 ASR backends, 60+ languages, AI summary/chat/mindmap, Open API, MCP server, and Agent Skill.

Discover a comprehensive backend roadmap covering foundational concepts such as databases and APIs, leading to proficiency in server-side scripting with languages like Python or Node.js. Ideal for developers seeking to enhance their backend development skills.

description: A repository for revising backend development concepts, including APIs, database management, authentication, and server-side logic. Ideal for refreshing key skills or learning new techniques in backend development.
API Server for Skill Bridge Project
a serverless backend api with the sls framework - for skills improvement purposes

This repo reflects my dedicated backend development journey, showcasing hands-on experience in server-side logic, database modeling, API design, authentication, file handling, and frontend integration. It demonstrates my commitment to mastering real-world backend skills with professional standards.
SkillBridge - Tutor Booking Platform A comprehensive backend API for connecting students with tutors, managing bookings, reviews, and availability.
SkillBridge Backend API – A scalable tutoring platform built with Node.js, Express, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, and Prisma.
I made this project to practice frontend and backend skills at JS
Server-side API for SkillBridge handling user management, tutor scheduling, bookings, and admin oversight
The SkillHorizon Server is a backend built with Node.js and Express.js, using MongoDB to manage data, authentication, and API endpoints for the SkillHorizon platform.

SkillForge Server is the NestJS backend for the SkillForge platform. It provides the REST API, realtime gateways, authentication, session scheduling, review workflows, analytics, and gamification services used by the React client.
This is the server-side application for **Skill Up Academy**, providing backend support and APIs for the Skill Up Academy platform.
This repository contains the backend codebase for the Skill Club freelancing platform, responsible for server-side logic, APIs, and data management.

🌐🚀 Learning Backend Development with Node.js & Express 💻🔥 A hands-on journey into backend mastery — building ⚡ RESTful APIs, 🗄️ databases, 🔐 authentication systems, and 🛠️ scalable server-side applications. This repo contains my daily practice, mini-projects, and experiments as I sharpen my backend skills.

SkillBridge is a backend API for a tutoring platform that connects students with tutors. It provides features for authentication, user management, tutor profiles, booking management, reviews, categories, and admin operations.

🚀 Job Scraper - A FastAPI & JavaScript-based tool to extract job postings from career pages! 🌐 Enter a URL, fetch job details using Llama-3, and display role, experience, skills & description. 📝 Built with FastAPI, LangChain, & Fetch API. 🔥 Perfect for job seekers & recruiters! 💼✨ #Python #FastAPI #WebScraping

The backend of the SkillShare platform, developed with Node.js and Express, powers the functionality of the skill-sharing social media platform by managing data, authentication, and real-time communication. This server provides a RESTful API to support all key operations and handles data storage with MongoDB.

SkillServe Backend provides the core API and server logic for the SkillServe platform, enabling secure user management, service provider onboarding, bookings, real-time communication, and data handling. It powers all interactions between the mobile/web clients and the database.
This project showcases my Skills in Developing Backends, Frontends, APIs, Servers and Cloud-Infrastructure, while using the latest technologies and concepts

Backend service for the SkillSwap application, a platform that enables users to exchange skills with others. This server handles authentication, user management, skill matching, and secure RESTful APIs, built with a focus on scalability and clean architecture.
This app shows my skill in creating a backend server using Nodejs, Express, Mongoose

SkillSwap Backend is a Node.js + Express server powering the SkillSwap MERN platform. It manages user auth, profiles, and skill exchange requests with MongoDB Atlas. Features include JWT auth, OTP verification, secure APIs, and cloud deployment via Vercel — built for seamless skill-sharing and collaboration.
Frontend deployed on Azure App Service with Discovery Server and API Gateway connects to Microservices backend deployed as Azure App Service

A learning-oriented REST API project designed to strengthen backend development skills, including API design, authentication/authorization, and database operations using Node.js, Express, and MongoDB.
Elevate Academy Server is a backend API for a digital skills school management platform built with NestJS and PostgreSQL.
🧠 Backend for DevTrack – RESTful API built with Express & Prisma for user auth, project/skill management, and public portfolios.

SkillSwap Backend is a Node.js + Express server powering the SkillSwap MERN platform. It manages user auth, profiles, and skill exchange requests with MongoDB Atlas. Features include JWT auth, OTP verification, secure APIs, and cloud deployment via Vercel — built for seamless skill-sharing and collaboration.
The backend of my League of Legends website where I show you your stats and help you improve your skills in the game. Built with javascript (Node JS) and I used docker for redis server..

Sheryian's Coding School Backend Series on YouTube helps learners JS for backend development. It covers key topics like build backend apps, working with APIs, server-side logic, and database integration. This series is aimed at those who want to develop backend skills using JS.
